title: Create: Simple storage recipes
description: Recipes for Tom's Simple Storage to match and use the Create mod.
body:
# 🔍 About This datapack changes the recipes of [Tom's simple storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) to fit with and use [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

Made to go alongside [Create: simple storage texturepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/toms-storage-create-style)![texturepack icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40542744c0464c952977e2a19d707110de2d2396.gif)

The new recipes might be very expensive; that could change in the future. Tip: Use [Just Enough Items(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To View The Recipe In-Game Check out the gallery to get an idea.

## ⚙️ Supported Version neoforge 1.21.x
create 6.0+
Tom's simple storage 2.0+ ## 🧩 Installation Guide ### Just place it in your datapack folder. But for those who don't know how to do it: 1. Go to where you have Minecraft installed. 1. Find the saves folder. 1. You'll see folders with the names of your worlds; choose the one you want to use the datapack on. 1. Place the file in the datapacks folder.
Something like this: C:\User\ .minecraft\saves\new_world\datapacks Just leave it there, done! [](https://www.curseforge.com/members/kentapainter/projects)[]()[]()
